name: Balearic Catalan
notes: Balearic (Mallorquí/Menorquí/Eivissenc). Eastern block, most archaic Catalan variety. Extreme vowel reduction (beyond Central Catalan). Article salat (es/sa instead of el/la). Partial /v/ preservation. Deaffrication of /tʃ/ → [ʃ] in Mallorcan. Dark [ɫ] in all positions. Conservative palatal lateral [ʎ]. Some varieties preserve /v/.
